records.ety: [L. petulania: cf. F. ptulance. See Petulant.]
entry_synonyms: Peevishness implies the permanence of a sour
petulance implies temporary or capricious irritation

defs: The quality or state of being petulant; temporary peevishness; pettishness; capricious ill humor.
quotes: Like pride in some, and like petulance in others.
The lowering eye, the petulance, the frown.
